content.rendered: Frank has more than 25 years of experience in the technology industry and service as Country Manager of AMI Greater China. He holds a Bachelor of Computer Information degree from Ming Chi University of Technology and an Executive MBA from National Chengchi University in Taiwan.

excerpt.rendered: Frank has more than 25 years of experience in the technology industry and service as Country Manager of AMI Greater China. He holds a Bachelor of Computer Information degree from Ming Chi University of Technology and an Executive MBA from National Chengchi University in Taiwan.
